component.name: SeriesLoaderTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "loadSeries" end sub
sub loadSeries() server = m.top.server username = m.top.username password = m.top.password
if server = "" or username = "" or password = "" m.top.error = "Missing Xtream Codes credentials" return end if
' Fetch series categories categoriesUrl = server + "/player_api.php?username=" + username + "&password=" + password + "&action=get_series_categories" categories = FetchJson(categoriesUrl)
if categories = invalid m.top.error = "Failed to load series categories" return end if
' Fetch all series seriesUrl = server + "/player_api.php?username=" + username + "&password=" + password + "&action=get_series" allSeries = FetchJson(seriesUrl)
if allSeries = invalid m.top.error = "Failed to load series" return end if
' Organize series by category seriesByCategory = {} categoryNames = {}
' Build category name lookup for each cat in categories categoryNames[cat.category_id.toStr()] = cat.category_name end for
' Group series by category for each show in allSeries catId = show.category_id.toStr() catName = categoryNames[catId] if catName = invalid then catName = "Uncategorized"
if seriesByCategory[catName] = invalid seriesByCategory[catName] = [] end if
seriesData = { id: show.series_id.toStr(), title: show.name, imageUrl: show.cover, year: show.year, rating: show.rating, categoryId: catId, categoryName: catName, plot: show.plot, cast: show.cast, director: show.director, genre: show.genre }
seriesByCategory[catName].Push(seriesData) end for
m.top.series = { categories: categories, seriesByCategory: seriesByCategory, totalCount: allSeries.Count() } end sub
function FetchJson(url as string) as object http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.setUrl(url) http.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.initClientCertificates() http.setConnectionTimeout(30) http.setReadTimeout(60)
response = http.getToString() if response = "" or response = invalid then return invalid
return ParseJson(response) end function
